title: Traceability Matrix
description: Maps a task to the specification sections it implements, tracking coverage across RFC, discovery, and UX design documents.

rfc_sections.description: RFC specification sections this task implements.

discovery_requirements.description: Discovery document requirements this task covers.

ux_elements.description: UX design elements this task addresses.

coverage_score.description: How much of the mapped specification is covered (0.0-1.0).

unmapped_specs.description: Specification requirements with no task mapping.

unmapped_tasks.description: Tasks with no specification mapping (potential red flag).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this matrix was generated.

SpecReference.description: A reference to a specific requirement in a specification document.

section.description: The section identifier within the document (e.g., '3.5', 'Error Recovery').

requirement.description: The specific requirement text from the specification.

verification_type.description: The type of verification needed for this requirement.
